data.body: 9622 pushed as Gerrit change 433; CI matrix (4 platforms) in progress, awaiting Verified+1 and LLM-Review+1. Plan for remainder: (1) close 9622 on Verified+1; (2) B1/a118 — stacks on 9622, has existing signed plan-review attestation; open decisions resolvable (streak via stdout emission of baseline_shadow_check for GHA-log derivation; live-heal restore procedure); B1 CODE can land this session but its 3+hr operational gate (>=10 clean shadow passes) cannot, so B1 won't CLOSE this session; (3) D1/d01e heavy live (hours); (4) eca4 broad loader refactor, do last. Full epic close spans beyond one continuous session due to B1/D1 wall-clock gates.
